Where Data
Becomes Decision

We are an independent statistical consulting office based in Jijel, turning raw data into clarity — so institutions, enterprises, and researchers can move forward with confidence.

Work With Us Explore Services
Scroll
Who We Are

A new kind of
statistical intelligence
for Jijel

DATA PREVISION is a micro-enterprise born from academic expertise in statistics and probability. We noticed a real gap: the Jijel region had no dedicated institution offering professional statistical support to its businesses, hospitals, universities, and public bodies.

We built DATA PREVISION to change that. Our team combines rigorous academic training with practical field experience — delivering studies, forecasts, and dashboards that are honest, readable, and built to inform real decisions.

🎯
Rigorous Methodology
Every study follows a documented, reproducible process — from design to final report.
🔒
Full Confidentiality
Your data and results remain exclusively yours. We sign NDAs on every engagement.
🌐
Local Presence, Modern Methods
We know Jijel's institutions and industries — and we apply international statistical standards.

Core offerings
Our Mission

How We Serve
the Jijel Region

🏥
Health & Research
Statistical support for hospitals, clinics, and researchers — case-control studies, cohort analysis, PhD survey design, and data interpretation.
🏢
Industry & Enterprise
Market studies, financial data analysis, and performance dashboards for companies ranging from agri-food to heavy industry and international ports.
🏛️
Public Institutions
Quantitative support for universities, banks, insurance companies, and local administrations seeking evidence-based reporting and planning.
What We Do

Our Services

01
Statistical Investigations
Design and implement tailored surveys with rigorous methodology and full documentation — from questionnaire design to final analysis.
02
Data Collection
Reliable, validated data gathering through structured field surveys and curated secondary sources, ensuring clean and usable datasets.
03
Reporting Dashboards
Clear, visual statistical dashboards built for decision-makers — turning complex outputs into actionable insight at a glance.
04
Market Research
Comprehensive market studies covering competitive landscapes, customer expectations, and demand forecasting for local economic actors.
05
Advanced Statistical Analysis
From descriptive statistics to advanced regression and multivariate modeling — both quantitative and qualitative approaches available.
06
Forecasting & Prevision
Predictive models and trend analyses that give your organization a reliable view of what comes next — so plans are grounded in evidence.
